base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: reduce tail MAE without materially reducing net profit or trade count
expected_effect: Target one very narrow MAE improvement: catch or reclassify the -527 charm_pin_pullback_long tail while preserving the fast extended-VWAP winner set. Reject if this removes materially more than the single near-boundary tail, reduces total net profit below 98% of run_001, lowers pnl_per_exposure_hour, or cuts protected fast winners.
label: surgical-extended-vwap-boundary-probe
rationale: The next experiment should not continue throughput pruning. Latest run_026 is slightly worse than run_001 on score, net profit, growth quality, fast trades, average MAE, and pnl/exposure, while the -527 worst MAE remains. The strongest actionable evidence is a surgical veto near-miss: the worst charm_pin_pullback_long trade was inside the enabled extended-VWAP rejection signature on every checked dimension except max VWAP distance, missing by only 0.2008 points. A one-key boundary probe is cleaner than repeating rejected charm-pin tail-box settings or applying broad profile filters that the protected-winner set explicitly warns against.
strategy_plan_next_experiments: Charm Pin High-Extension Tail Box Refinement
